text: Artificial intelligence offers great benefits, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias: AI systems can learn from data that contains unfair human prejudices, leading to decisions that discriminate against certain groups. To ensure fairness, developers must carefully check their training data and algorithms. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often relies on large amounts of personal information, which needs to be protected. Transparency is also crucial; users should understand how and why AI makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means building systems that are fair, respectful of privacy, and clearly explained, so they can be trusted by everyone.
